title: Mayas lesbian side shine in 30
wikitext:
[]: Maya's lesbian side shine in 3.0?             Quote Post by Ritsuko » Sat Mar 05, 2011 10:17 am Hope for something along the lines of obsessive or compulsive to give it that creepy eva vibe. With 2 or 1 final big ass movie coming in 2 years tops I don't see why they can't put Ibuki chan in the spot light. Another thing I hope for is Ritsuko giving up on Gendo in 4.0 and maybe getting a new look. Compulsive? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Mar 05, 2011 11:13 am Shinji's lesbian side? I don't think Rebuild has gone there yet, though it depends what gets pulled out of the wincest soup. Oh, wait, you're talking about another character. I didn't think there were any of any consequence in Rebuild -- even Ritsu only gets wheeled on to do the technobabble narration.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sat Mar 05, 2011 11:45 am Well, since it's a Theatrical series, perhaps they're now going to make Maya's secret enamored feeling of Ritsuko a bit more broader than EoE... this gonna be good.

[]:             Quote Post by Ritsuko » Sat Mar 05, 2011 11:59 am Mr. Tines wrote: Shinji's lesbian side? I don't think Rebuild has gone there yet, though it depends what gets pulled out of the wincest soup. Oh, wait, you're talking about another character. I didn't think there were any of any consequence in Rebuild -- even Ritsu only gets wheeled on to do the technobabble narration.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sat Mar 05, 2011 12:07 pm Ritsuko wrote: Funny how they never put Shinji standing next to Maya side by side. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by DoubleZeva » Sat Mar 05, 2011 2:41 pm Maya also has Nadia's face? Never noticed that before.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueOcean » Sat Mar 05, 2011 3:39 pm I'd love to see some more development of the supporting characters in Rebuild 3.0 and 4.0, but I do not think there will be enough time to support it. There would be simply too much going on at the same time: we still need to find out about what happened to Asuka, where Gendo, Fuyutsuki and Donkey are going, and most importantly about Kaworu and why he's here, and that will cause a lot of shit to happen. Also, Rebuild seems to be a bit more action oriented, meaning that there won't be as much time as before to expand the relationships of other characters, mainly focusing on the Children. We can always hope though; and if "Rebuild is a sequel to EoE [Anno is a master troll]" argument is true, I imagine that Maya will be more active in her interest of Ritsuko, if she gets any more lines than "The pattern is blue!" or being stricken by terror.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sat Mar 05, 2011 3:46 pm BlueOcean wrote: I'd love to see some more development of the supporting characters in Rebuild 3.0 and 4.0, but I do not think there will be enough time to support it. There would be simply too much going on at the same time

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Mar 05, 2011 5:38 pm I doubt we'll get any more than an equivalent of the tanging scene. 4 Movies are barely enough for the Children and Gendo. The other adults more or less fell into the background...

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Mar 05, 2011 7:45 pm Fuck Impacts and Angels, give me some Maya/Shinji lesbian action.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Mar 05, 2011 8:02 pm Seeing as how Maya's 'lesbianism' was just a sudden "Oh my, that's different" moment during the closing act of EOE I highly doubt it. There's nothing to be gained from it but more incessant fan fiction.

[]:             Quote Post by Ritsuko » Sun Mar 06, 2011 9:21 am the_seventh_child wrote: Fuck Impacts and Angels, give me some Maya/Shinji lesbian action.

[]:             Quote Post by Number 44 » Sun Mar 06, 2011 5:38 pm Ritsuko wrote: A side extra on blu-ray called "Maya's day off" . A 30 min extra showing us what Maya does on her off days and all the fanwank goodies. I think everybody should get a "Day off" mini movie. Dig deeper into the Eva characters.

[]:             Quote Post by Tabby-chan » Wed Mar 09, 2011 4:51 pm Eh... Could we see a clip of the short? I can't find it on YT, unless you were just joking.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Wed Mar 09, 2011 5:46 pm Tabby-chan wrote: Eh... Could we see a clip of the short? I can't find it on YT, unless you were just joking.
